message.content:
## Proposed KB Updates for npm package `validator` (validator.js)

---

### Known Vulnerabilities Table (Candidate Rows)

| CVE / GHSA | Severity | Affected Versions | Fixed Version | Summary |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| CVE-2013-7451 / GHSA-qpjp-7rp2-9c3f | Moderate | < 1.1.0 | 1.1.0 | XSS filter bypass via nested tags |
| CVE-2013-7452 / GHSA-rh6c-q938-3r9q | Moderate | < 1.1.0 | 1.1.0 | XSS filter bypass via crafted `javascript:` URI |
| CVE-2013-7453 / GHSA-552w-rqg8-gxxm | Moderate | < 1.1.0 | 1.1.0 | XSS filter bypass via UI redressing |
| CVE-2013-7454 / GHSA-q4qq-fm7q-cwp5 | Moderate | < 1.1.0 | 1.1.0 | Multiple XSS filter bypasses (nested forbidden strings, incomplete `javascript:` filtering, nested tags) |
| CVE-2014-8882 / GHSA-f5w6-r7rg-mcgq | Moderate | < 3.22.1 | 3.22.1 | Regular Expression Denial of Service (ReDoS) in `isURL` |
| CVE-2014-9772 / GHSA-79mx-88w7-8f7q | Moderate | < 2.0.0 | 2.0.0 | XSS filter bypass via hex-encoded characters in attributes |
| CVE-2021-3765 / GHSA-qgmg-gppg-76g5 & GHSA-xx4c-jj58-r7x6 | Moderate | < 13.7.0 | 13.7.0 | Inefficient Regular Expression Complexity (ReDoS) in `rtrim`/`trim` sanitizers |
| CVE-2025-56200 / GHSA-9965-vmph-33xx | Moderate–High | < 13.15.20 | 13.15.20 | `isURL()` protocol-parsing discrepancy (`://` vs `:`) enables validation bypass → XSS / Open Redirect |
| CVE-2025-12758 / GHSA-vghf-hv5q-vc2g | Moderate | < 13.15.22 | 13.15.22 | `isLength()` miscounts string length due to Unicode variation selectors (U+FE0F, U+FE0E), enabling oversized input acceptance |

---

### Security Posture Bullets

- **Current release context:** Package is at 13.15.23 per observed changelog. All advisories listed above are fixed in versions ≤ 13.15.22, so **13.15.22+ resolves all known public CVEs** as of this review.
- **Active maintenance:** Recent fixes (13.15.20 and 13.15.22) demonstrate ongoing responsiveness to vulnerability reports; turnaround on CVE-2025-56200 and CVE-2025-12758 appears prompt based on issue→fix timeline.
- **ReDoS history:** Two distinct ReDoS episodes (CVE-2014-8882 in `isURL`, CVE-2021-3765 in `rtrim`/`trim`). Users on versions prior to 13.7.0 should treat upgrade as high priority.
- **URL validation has been a recurring attack surface:** Three separate advisories touch `isURL` behavior (CVE-2014-8882, CVE-2025-56200, plus the protocol-parsing fix). Consumers relying on `isURL()` for security-critical decisions (e.g., allowlisting protocols, redirect targets) should pin ≥ 13.15.20 and review their `isURL` option configurations.
- **`isLength()` Unicode edge case (CVE-2025-12758):** Applications using `isLength()` as a database-truncation guard or size-limit enforcement should upgrade to ≥ 13.15.22; Unicode variation selectors can inflate the actual byte/codepoint count beyond the reported length.
- **No unpatched advisories observed** in OSV/GHSA as of this review for versions ≥ 13.15.22.

---

### Caveats: Legacy `xss()` / Blacklist-Filter Lineage vs. Modern API

- **The `xss()` function was removed in validator 2.0.0.** Five of the nine advisories above (CVE-2013-7451, CVE-2013-7452, CVE-2013-7453, CVE-2013-7454
